text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, December 16. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning for future education costs. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Budget tracking is updated. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
